## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring Manager Interview for SEO Specialist role at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/8WyCSyC7_a74whMxp5jyHye1GR79GsYf?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is a services agency leveraging AI for content creation, seeking an SEO Strategist to provide high-level, objective strategy across client accounts](https://fathom.video/share/8WyCSyC7_a74whMxp5jyHye1GR79GsYf?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [The role involves quarterly strategy evaluation, data analysis, and experiment tracking, particularly for SEO and GEO](https://fathom.video/share/8WyCSyC7_a74whMxp5jyHye1GR79GsYf?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [Brandon has extensive SEO experience, including scaling traffic from 5k to 130k monthly visitors and growing keywords by 40k+ at Embark Behavioral Health](https://fathom.video/share/8WyCSyC7_a74whMxp5jyHye1GR79GsYf?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [The position requires proactivity, quick context-switching, and strong organizational skills to manage multiple client strategies](https://fathom.video/share/8WyCSyC7_a74whMxp5jyHye1GR79GsYf?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Company Overview and Role Description

  - [Services agency using AI-driven platform for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/8WyCSyC7_a74whMxp5jyHye1GR79GsYf?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)
  - [Leveraging human-in-the-loop approach for strategic problem-solving](https://fathom.video/share/8WyCSyC7_a74whMxp5jyHye1GR79GsYf?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [Pod model with AI workflows, managing editors, and account managers](https://fathom.video/share/8WyCSyC7_a74whMxp5jyHye1GR79GsYf?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [SEO Strategist role:](https://fathom.video/share/8WyCSyC7_a74whMxp5jyHye1GR79GsYf?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
      - [Provide quarterly strategy evaluation and redirection](https://fathom.video/share/8WyCSyC7_a74whMxp5jyHye1GR79GsYf?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
      - [Analyze data and look for signals to inform strategy](https://fathom.video/share/8WyCSyC7_a74whMxp5jyHye1GR79GsYf?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
      - [Run experiments and track signals, especially for GEO](https://fathom.video/share/8WyCSyC7_a74whMxp5jyHye1GR79GsYf?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
      - [Focus on organic blog content growth strategy](https://fathom.video/share/8WyCSyC7_a74whMxp5jyHye1GR79GsYf?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
      - [No direct content generation or strategy execution](https://fathom.video/share/8WyCSyC7_a74whMxp5jyHye1GR79GsYf?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)

### Brandon's Experience and Achievements

  - [Created AR app for local business marketing during master's program](https://fathom.video/share/8WyCSyC7_a74whMxp5jyHye1GR79GsYf?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [Performed SEO auditing and implementation across multiple platforms](https://fathom.video/share/8WyCSyC7_a74whMxp5jyHye1GR79GsYf?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [At Embark Behavioral Health:](https://fathom.video/share/8WyCSyC7_a74whMxp5jyHye1GR79GsYf?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
      - [Scaled traffic from 5k to 130k+ monthly visitors](https://fathom.video/share/8WyCSyC7_a74whMxp5jyHye1GR79GsYf?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
      - [Grew keywords by 40k+, with 2k in top positions](https://fathom.video/share/8WyCSyC7_a74whMxp5jyHye1GR79GsYf?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
      - [Built startup marketing team from ground up](https://fathom.video/share/8WyCSyC7_a74whMxp5jyHye1GR79GsYf?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
      - [Created AI-driven content engine for traffic and keyword growth](https://fathom.video/share/8WyCSyC7_a74whMxp5jyHye1GR79GsYf?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
      - [Managed SEO for 15+ client websites](https://fathom.video/share/8WyCSyC7_a74whMxp5jyHye1GR79GsYf?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
      - [Implemented technical audits, local SEO, and backlink building strategies](https://fathom.video/share/8WyCSyC7_a74whMxp5jyHye1GR79GsYf?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)

### Strategy and Process Management

  - [Focuses on 30, 60, 90-day sprint campaigns for quick wins and long-term growth](https://fathom.video/share/8WyCSyC7_a74whMxp5jyHye1GR79GsYf?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
  - [Prioritizes technical fixes and low-hanging fruit before aesthetic changes](https://fathom.video/share/8WyCSyC7_a74whMxp5jyHye1GR79GsYf?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [Uses project management tools (e.g., Kanban boards) to communicate strategy and progress](https://fathom.video/share/8WyCSyC7_a74whMxp5jyHye1GR79GsYf?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
  - [Adapts quickly to changing needs (e.g., treatment center closures) with 30-day impact campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/8WyCSyC7_a74whMxp5jyHye1GR79GsYf?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [Documents processes using Monday.com for cross-team visibility and accountability](https://fathom.video/share/8WyCSyC7_a74whMxp5jyHye1GR79GsYf?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)

### Communication and Reporting

  - [Tailors communication style to audience (e.g., C-suite vs. clinical teams)](https://fathom.video/share/8WyCSyC7_a74whMxp5jyHye1GR79GsYf?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [Focuses on relevant metrics for each stakeholder (e.g., CAC, LTV, ROI for financial teams)](https://fathom.video/share/8WyCSyC7_a74whMxp5jyHye1GR79GsYf?tab=summary&timestamp=895.0)
  - [Uses Looker Studio dashboards with data from SEMrush, Search Console, and GA4](https://fathom.video/share/8WyCSyC7_a74whMxp5jyHye1GR79GsYf?tab=summary&timestamp=929.0)
  - [Emphasizes non-vanity metrics and real-world impact in reporting](https://fathom.video/share/8WyCSyC7_a74whMxp5jyHye1GR79GsYf?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)

### GrowthX Team Structure and Operations

  - [Mix of account strategists/directors with editorial and SEO backgrounds](https://fathom.video/share/8WyCSyC7_a74whMxp5jyHye1GR79GsYf?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
  - [Building a metrics dashboard (expected in \~1 month)](https://fathom.video/share/8WyCSyC7_a74whMxp5jyHye1GR79GsYf?tab=summary&timestamp=1067.0)
  - [SEO Specialist role may report to Head of Customer Operations or Head of Growth](https://fathom.video/share/8WyCSyC7_a74whMxp5jyHye1GR79GsYf?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)
  - [Focus on qualitative, justifiable, and defensible strategy approach](https://fathom.video/share/8WyCSyC7_a74whMxp5jyHye1GR79GsYf?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Emphasis on Geo experimentation and programmatic thinking](https://fathom.video/share/8WyCSyC7_a74whMxp5jyHye1GR79GsYf?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to decide reporting structure for the SEO Specialist role (Andi vs. Jason)](https://fathom.video/share/8WyCSyC7_a74whMxp5jyHye1GR79GsYf?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
  - [Further discussions on how the role will integrate with existing team and processes](https://fathom.video/share/8WyCSyC7_a74whMxp5jyHye1GR79GsYf?tab=summary&timestamp=1583.0)
  - [Potential follow-up interview with Jason (Head of Growth) to discuss programmatic approach and Geo experimentation](https://fathom.video/share/8WyCSyC7_a74whMxp5jyHye1GR79GsYf?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
